## BaseSuggestions class

Paints a list of suggestions passed in by prop. Requires a component for a single suggestion in the default slot for working.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseSuggestions extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.basesuggestions.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the suggestion. |
|  [maxItemsToRender?](./x-components.basesuggestions.maxitemstorender.md) |  | number | <i>(Optional)</i> Number of suggestions to be rendered. |
|  [suggestions](./x-components.basesuggestions.suggestions.md) |  | Suggestion\[\] | The list of suggestions to render. |
